text:
is a DVD (Catalog number PHVD-403) created and published by Visual K Co., Ltd. on 01 September 2016. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/B01FJNWODS/ 

Overview

The video focuses on scenes of the train in motion, running scenes between Hakata and Shin-Osaka, the video also includes the exterior of the train, as well as the "life-size cockpit boarding experience", photo spots, dioramas, and other exhibits and experience rooms inside the train! We will also introduce other trains that are in use on the Sanyo Shinkansen! https://web.archive.org/web/20161017213720mp_/http://www.evastore.jp/pc/article/A6006901.html
